pkgmetadata.longdescription: Datadog Checks Dev[[Latest PyPI version][1]][3][[Supported Python versions][2]][3]-----This is the developer toolkit designed for use by any [Agent-based][5] check orintegration repository. InstallationSee [this guide][6]. DocumentationDocs are available [here][7].[1] httpsimg.shields.iopypivdatadog-checks-dev.svg[2] httpsimg.shields.iopypipyversionsdatadog-checks-dev.svg[3] httpspypi.orgprojectdatadog-checks-dev[5] httpsgithub.comDataDogdatadog-agent[6] httpsdatadoghq.devintegrations-coresetupddev[7] httpsdatadoghq.devintegrations-coreddevabout
